calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Order To Honor Authority Of Attorney-In-Fact
Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bette Epstein for Bank of America (Respondent/Objector). Haig Harris for Dr. David Harris (Petitioner).

The Court stated that the Petition for Order to Honor Authority of Attorney-In-Fact is moot since Ms. Harris has passed away. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the issue of whether Bank of America and Nelson Cooney acted unreasonably. The issue of Attorney's fees was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Guitron.

PETITION Petition For Order To Honor Authority Of Attorney-In-Fact
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Continued To May-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
